0.52.en: Don't let my love become a tragic Juliet

28.07.en: Oh, by all means, sweet dreams

35.60.en: Intoxicating caramel that catches in my throat

39.21.en: I tangle my shy bare legs with yours

42.32.en: How far can we go tonight?

49.80.en: I still don't like bitter things

52.69.en: It's from eating nothing but Mama's sweets, isn't it

58.06.en: If there's something I don't know yet

61.16.en: wanting to know it is only natural, right?

65.81.en: If it's you, I'll show you mine too...

74.41.en: I'll run off in just my school uniform

79.54.en: or some bad person will get in our way

82.54.en: I want to run away, this Juliet

85.31.en: but don't call me by that name

88.15.en: You're right — we have to be tied together

en: — we have to be tied together

91.08.en: otherwise none of this is any fun

93.93.en: Hey — will you live your life with me?

99.56.en: Stretching myself taller with long mascara

113.95.en: I'll be a good girl, starting tomorrow for sure

116.79.en: so just for tonight, forgive me

121.02.en: The boundary line of black lace —

128.47.en: If I cross it, how far can I go?

136.06.en: I'm the one who fell for you that hard, aren't I

en: the one who fell for you that hard

138.80.en: But you know, Papa seems to hate you

144.17.en: The hand he holds out, saying it's for my own good —

en: saying it's for my own good

147.83.en: what he's gripping is a leash, isn't it

153.47.en: somewhere so far we'll be scolded for it

159.72.en: I'll leave the glass slipper behind

165.75.en: or a bad dream will catch up with me

168.71.en: I bet that girl was just like this too

171.57.en: lying when she said she dropped it

174.71.en: You're right — I'm the same as her

176.96.en: because I want to be loved more

192.39.en: Won't you peek gently into my heart?

202.97.en: Isn't it overflowing with only the things I want?

jp: あふれかえっていませんか
en: with only the things I want

208.50.en: There's still room — cram more and more in tight

214.23.en: Should I just fill in even the space where you belong?

jp: あなたの居場所までも

224.81.en: They say happiness lives in a small box, not a big one

231.08.en: What do I do — at this rate

236.45.en: But Papa and Mama, greedier than me, never change, even today

242.55.en: You're right — honesty is the best policy

244.75.en: What I dropped was the golden axe

250.38.en: and got eaten by the wolf, apparently

253.32.en: What do I do? At this rate, I'll —

258.93.en: so come rescue me before that happens
